skills.name: artefacts
skills.description: Compact ANT artefacts primer for room-scoped plans, docs, decks, sheets, and local dev site tunnels.

skills.name: chat-break
skills.description: Compact ANT chat-break primer for using /break, bounded context, and long-memory rooms without rereading the full design doc.

skills.name: chat-routing
skills.description: Compact ANT chat routing primer for agents posting into rooms, using @mentions, and avoiding accidental interrupts.

skills.name: planning
skills.description: Compact ANT planning primer for agents that need to create, update, review, or close plan-backed work without rereading the long docs.

skills.name: task-lifecycle
skills.description: Compact ANT task lifecycle primer for creating, assigning, reviewing, and closing plan-linked tasks with real provenance.

skills.name: create-verification-lens
skills.description: Translate plain-English requirements into a concrete verification lens spec. Agent reads protocol from docs/specs/, produces a SkillSuccessOutput JSON, posts via POST /api/verification/lenses + POST .../tag-rows. Protocol available at /api/skills/create-verification-lens/protocol.
